name: plane-tts
description: GNOME Shell TTS extension using OmniVoice
author: Felipe <felipe@wfelipe.com>

scripts.build: bun run build:schema && bun run build:translations
scripts.pack: bun run build && rm -f plane-tts@wfelipe.com.zip && bsdtar -cf plane-tts@wfelipe.com.zip --format=zip metadata.json extension.js prefs.js stylesheet.css tts.py schemas/ locale/
scripts.merge:translations: for file in po/*.po; do msgmerge --update --no-fuzzy-matching -N $file po/plane-tts@wfelipe.com.pot --backup=none; done
scripts.update:translations: bun run create:translations && bun run merge:translations && bun run build:translations
